litellm-code.description: LiteLLM is an open source AI Gateway that gives you a single, unified interface to call 100+ LLM roviders — OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock, Azure, and more — using the OpenAI format. Use it as a Python SDK for direct library integration, or deploy the AI Gateway (Proxy Server) as a centralized service for your team or organization.
